encoder.pattern: %d{yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX} %-5level [%thread] %logger{36} traceId=%X{traceId:-} messageType=%X{messageType:-} objectClass=%X{objectClass:-} objectId=%X{objectId:-} beforeRevisionId=%X{beforeRevisionId:-} afterRevisionId=%X{afterRevisionId:-} candidates=%X{candidateSubscriptionCount:-} matched=%X{matchedSubscriptionCount:-} requestedFields=%X{requestedFieldCount:-} stage=%X{processingStage:-} errorCode=%X{errorCode:-} - %msg%n
